stemHtml: Select the correct statement with regard to the effect on the ground roll distance if the flap-angle setting is increased from 5° to 10°. The ground roll distance is…

options.a: increased due to the increased drag, which increases the stalling speed and the required take-off speed.
options.b: reduced due to the increased lift, which reduces the stalling speed and the required take-off speed.
options.c: reduced due to the increased lift, which increases the stalling speed, requiring a lower take-off speed.
options.d: increased due to the reduced lift, which increases the stalling speed and the required take-off speed.
